stemHtml: Action plans SOP’s in a cockpit must…

options.a: be shared by the members of the crew and updated at each modification in order to maintain maximum synergy
options.b: only follow the manufacturers proposals and not reflect individual operators cockpit philosophies
options.c: be tailored to the individual pilot’s needs in order to facilitate the normal operation of the aircraft
options.d: only be tailored to the type of aircraft, regardless of current MCC procedures
